CVE-2023-43788.title: A vulnerability was found in libXpm due to a boundary condition w ...
CVE-2023-43788.description: A vulnerability was found in libXpm due to a boundary condition within the XpmCreateXpmImageFromBuffer() function. This flaw allows a local attacker to trigger an out-of-bounds read error and read the contents of memory on the system.

CVE-2023-43789.title: A vulnerability was found in libXpm where a vulnerability exists  ...
CVE-2023-43789.description: A vulnerability was found in libXpm where a vulnerability exists due to a boundary condition, a local user can trigger an out-of-bounds read error and read contents of memory on the system.
